name: Hand Print Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Refrigerator Sugar Cookie Dough Rolls
Various icings in tubes from supermarket
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each sugar cookie dough roll in half.
2. Form each half into a ball and flatten into a disk.
3. Wrap the disks in plastic wrap and refrigerate about 45 minutes until firm.
4. Use hand shapes as guides for making cookies (draw or cut out family members' hands).
5. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F. (check temperature on cookie dough package).
6. Working with one dough ball at a time on a floured board, roll out the dough to about 1/4 inch thick.
7. Place paper hand cut-out on the dough and trace with a sharp knife to create cookie hands.
8. Transfer the cookie hands onto baking sheets.
9. Bake until light golden brown.
10. Remove from oven and let cool completely on a cooling rack before decorating.
11. Decorate using icings and candies. Consider writing family members' names on each cookie for added personal touch. This step is best done with kids!
